_comment: Canonical PWMGovernance addresses per network. Mirrors addresses.json for the .PWMGovernance entry but kept here for the multisig audit trail. Update when redeploys happen.

testnet._note: Sepolia testnet. Founders are hot wallets used for deploy convenience. Do NOT replicate this on mainnet.

baseSepolia._note: Base Sepolia rehearsal deploy. Use the same 5 addresses planned for mainnet so the rehearsal exercises the real flow end-to-end.

base._note: Base L2 mainnet. Founders MUST be the 5 hardware-wallet addresses recorded in multisig/signers.md. Set-once at PWMGovernance constructor; cannot be changed without redeploy or DAO activation.
